aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic level of AEO readiness with some critical gaps in local SEO and online reputation management.
quick_wins: Encourage customers to leave Google reviews to build a credible online presence.
Optimize the website's metadata and headings with relevant local HVAC keywords.
Expand the 'Service Areas' section with detailed location-based content.

gbp_analysis.found: Google Business Profile (GBP) not analyzed due to lack of information about its existence.
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a GBP or related data makes it difficult to assess local search performance and customer engagement.
critical_issues: No evidence of an active GBP listing.
Missing GBP insights and local search performance data.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) information on its website but lacks widespread citations across directories.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories like Yelp, Yellow Pages, and Bing Places.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and local directories.
Monitor and update citations regularly to maintain accuracy.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema is missing detailed service area information.
Review schema is absent, which could help display customer testimonials.
FAQPage schema could be added to address common customer queries.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and GBP listing severely limits local search visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in the Twin Cities area on Google Maps and local search results.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Setting up and optimizing a GBP listing to capture local search traffic.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publishing high-quality, locally relevant content and building backlinks from local organizations or news outlets.

page_title: Homepage - | Ray N. Welter Heating Company
